name: zotero-mcp-rs
description: High-performance Zotero MCP server written in Rust

src.main.rs: Entry point, CLI parsing, transport setup (stdio/HTTP)
src.server.rs: MCP server with tool router and 15 registered tools

clients/.zotero.rs: Zotero API HTTP client with authentication
clients/.webdav.rs: WebDAV client for PDF file uploads

services/.arxiv.rs: arXiv API integration for paper metadata
services/.crossref.rs: CrossRef API integration for DOI lookup
services/.search_engine.rs: Unified search with tag clauses and filters
services/.oa_sources.rs: Open Access source detection (arXiv, Unpaywall, PMC)

tools.name: zotero_search
tools.description: Unified Zotero search by text, tags, citation key, or advanced conditions

tools.name: zotero_get_item
tools.description: Get item metadata, children, fulltext, and/or BibTeX sections

tools.name: zotero_update_item
tools.description: Update one item, or batch-update tags across many items

tools.name: zotero_delete_item
tools.description: Delete one or more Zotero items by key

tools.name: zotero_get_annotations
tools.description: Get all annotations for a specific item or across library

tools.name: zotero_get_notes
tools.description: Retrieve notes, or search notes + annotations when query is provided

tools.name: zotero_add_note
tools.description: Create either a Zotero note or annotation based on type

tools.name: zotero_list_collections
tools.description: List collections, search collections, or retrieve items in a collection

tools.name: zotero_manage_collections
tools.description: Create/delete collections, or add/remove items in a collection

tools.name: zotero_get_recent
tools.description: Get recently added items to your Zotero library

tools.name: zotero_list_tags
tools.description: Get all tags used in your Zotero library

tools.name: zotero_deduplicate
tools.description: Find or merge duplicate items in your library

tools.name: fetch
tools.description: ChatGPT connector fetch: return item text payload by Zotero item key

tools.name: zotero_add_paper
tools.description: Add a paper to Zotero by URL, DOI, arXiv ID, ISBN, or local file path

tools.name: zotero_rename_attachments
tools.description: Rename PDF/file attachments using Zotero's naming template

optional.name: ZOTERO_LIBRARY_ID
optional.description: Library ID (user ID or group ID). Auto-detected if not set.

optional.name: WEBDAV_URL
optional.description: WebDAV server URL for file uploads

stdio.description: Standard input/output transport for MCP clients

http.description: HTTP Streamable transport for remote access
